prompt: How many students enrolled per year at the university?

inputData.question: How many students enrolled per year at the university?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"How many students enrolled per year at the university?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"How many students enrolled per year at the university?"},"startedAt":1771855522571,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The students table has an enrollment_date column that captures when each student enrolled. To count students per year, I extract the year from enrollment_date, group by that year, and count distinct student IDs. This gives the enrollment count per year at the university.","sql":"
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)::INTEGER AS enrollment_year,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC
","assumptions":["The enrollment_date column in the students table represents when each student enrolled at the university","Each row in the students table represents a unique student","We count all students regardless of current status"]},"endedAt":1771855551267},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Student Enrollment per Year
visualization.description: Number of students enrolled at the university by year

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)::INTEGER AS enrollment_year,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC

visualization.title: Student Enrollment per Year
visualization.description: Number of students enrolled at the university by year

result.sql:
SELECT 
  EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)::INTEGER AS enrollment_year,
  COUNT(s.id) AS student_count
FROM students s
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.enrollment_date)
ORDER BY enrollment_year ASC
